---
name: Bug report
about: Report reproducible incorrect behavior in jobman
title: "bug: "
labels:
  - bug
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe what happened and why it appears incorrect.

## Reproduction

Provide the smallest command or sequence that reproduces the problem. Remove
credentials, tokens, private paths, and other sensitive data.

```console
$ jobman ...
```

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

Include relevant output, logs, and exit codes. Use fenced code blocks and redact
secrets.

## Environment

- jobman version or commit:
- installation method:
- operating system and architecture:
- shell and version:
- configuration source, if relevant:

## Additional context

Include anything else that may help diagnosis. Report security vulnerabilities
privately according to `SECURITY.md` instead of using this template.
